popularStory.headline: Adam Mott
popularStory.description:
Adam Mott was married first to Elizabeth Creel and his second wife was Sarah Lott.  Sarah maiden name was Jennings and she married her first husband Englebert Lott.  
Adam was a tailor of Cambridge, E …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Adam Mott於1596年8月12日出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其時，他的父親John Mott II20歲，母親Elizabeth Hollis31歲。他於1616年10月28日與Elizabeth Creel在英國艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1635年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利且於1635年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利。他於1642年登記服兵役。他於1635年被列為tailor in england, and farmer in rhode island colony。他去世於1661年8月12日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特波斯姆斯，埋葬在美國羅得島紐波特波斯姆斯波斯姆斯 福利茲 亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adam Mott于1596年8月12日出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其时，他的父亲John Mott II20岁，母亲Elizabeth Hollis31岁。他于1616年10月28日与Elizabeth Creel在英国艾可莎佛朗 瓦爾登结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1635年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利且于1635年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼洛波利。他于1642年登记服兵役。他于1635年被列为tailor in england, and farmer in rhode island colony。他去世于1661年8月12日之前在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特波斯姆斯，埋葬在美国罗德岛州紐波特波斯姆斯波斯姆斯 福利茲 亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Mott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Motte, a pet form of Matilda. There has probably been some confusion with Moat .
German: topographic name for someone who lived by or owned property in a marshy area, from Middle High German mot ‘mud, swamp’.

variants.name: Motts
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of Mott , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Moat
meanings: English: from Middle English mote ‘moat, protective ditch’ (Old French mote, motte ‘mound, embankment’). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived at or by a moat, or habitational, from one of many minor places so named in England and Scotland. There has probably been some confusion with Mott .

nameMeanings.name: Adam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: First Baptist Church
historicEvents.description: Roger Williams establishes the First Baptist Church of Rhode Island in Providence during 1638.
Oldest grave seen in memorials list.

en.lifeSummary: When Adam Mott was born on 12 August 1596, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Mott II, was 20 and his mother, Elizabeth Hollis, was 31. He married Elizabeth Creel on 28 October 1616, in Saffron Walden, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1635 and Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1635. He registered for military service in 1642. In 1635, his occupation is listed as tailor in england, and farmer in rhode island colony. He died before 12 August 1661, in Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, and was buried in Portsmouth Friends Churchyard, Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adam Mott est né le 12 août 1596, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mott II, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hollis, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Creel le 28 octobre 1616, à Saffron Walden, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1635 et à Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1635. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1642. En 1635, sa profession de son indiquée est tailor in england, and farmer in rhode island colony. Il est décédé avant 12 août 1661, à Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterré à Portsmouth Friends Churchyard, Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adam Mott am 12. August 1596 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Mott II 20 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Hollis 31. Er hat am 28. Oktober 1616 in Saffron Walden, Essex, England Elizabeth Creel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1635 hat er in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und 1635 in Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er hat sich 1642 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1635 ist sein Beruf als tailor in england, and farmer in rhode island colony aufgeführt. Er starb vor 12. August 1661 in Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America und wurde in Portsmouth Friends Churchyard, Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Mott è nato il il 12 agosto 1596 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Mott II, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Hollis, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Creel il 28 ottobre 1616, nel Saffron Walden, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1635 e nel Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1635. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1642. Nel 1635, la sua occupazione è indicata come tailor in england, and farmer in rhode island colony. Morì prima del 12 agosto 1661, nel Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, e fu sepolto a Portsmouth Friends Churchyard, Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Adam Mottが1596年8月12日にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた時，父John Mott IIは20歳，母Elizabeth Hollisは31歳であった。1616年10月28日にイギリスエセックスサフロン ワルデンでElizabeth Creelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1635年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーに，1635年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーロクスブリーに住んでいた。彼は1642年に兵役登録をした。1635年，職業はtailor in england, and farmer in rhode island colonyと記録されている。彼は1661年8月12日以前にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトポルトスモウスで死去し，アメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトポルトスモウスポルトスモウス フリーンズ チャーチヤルドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adam Mott(이)가 1596년 8월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mott II(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Hollis(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1616년 10월 28일 영국 에세스 사프런 월든에서 Elizabeth Creel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1635년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서, 1635년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 록스버이에서 살았다. 그는 1642년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1635년, 그의 직업은 tailor in england, and farmer in rhode island colony이었다. 그는 1661년 8월 12일 이전 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 포츠모우스에서 사망했으며 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 포츠모우스 포츠모우스 프리드즈 처르c히아어드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adam Mott nasceu em 12 de agosto de 1596, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Mott II, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Hollis, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Creel em 28 de outubro de 1616, em Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1635 e em Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1635. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1642. Em 1635, sua profissão aparece como tailor in england, and farmer in rhode island colony. Ele faleceu antes 12 de agosto de 1661, em Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Portsmouth Friends Churchyard, Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adam Mott родился 12 августа 1596 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Mott II было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hollis, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Creel 28 октября 1616 г. в местности саффрон валден, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году и в местности роксбури, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году. В 1642 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1635 годуработал по профессии tailor in england, and farmer in rhode island colony. Он умер перед 12 августа 1661 г. в местности порцмоут, нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности порцмоут фриендс чурчярд, порцмоут, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты.

es.12 August 1596–before 12 August 1661: 12 de agosto de 1596–antes de 12 de agosto de 1661

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adam Mott nació el 12 de agosto de 1596, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Mott II, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hollis, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Creel el 28 de octubre de 1616, en Saffron Walden, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1635 y en Roxbury, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1635. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1642. En 1635, su ocupación registrada era tailor in england, and farmer in rhode island colony. Murió antes de 12 de agosto de 1661, en Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, y fue sepultado en Portsmouth Friends Churchyard, Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos.
